title: Wire SG_SPEC_TOKEN into api-verify workflow
intent: Restore dead api-verify gate: configure git before pip install so private sg-spec clone succeeds in CI.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Add SG_SPEC_TOKEN git url rewrite to api_verify.yml before requirements install. Mark CI-RED-001 IN_PROGRESS in SPRINTS.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: SG_SPEC_TOKEN secret exists but api_verify.yml was the only API workflow missing git auth — install died before make api-verify could run.

files.intent: Configure git with SG_SPEC_TOKEN before pip install (CI-RED-001).
verification: CI: api-verify Install API deps step succeeds on PR

files.intent: CI-RED-001 status IN_PROGRESS until api-verify green in CI.
